---
title: Latent Speech Representations Learned Through Self-Supervised Learning Predict
  Listeners' Generalization of Adaptation Across Talkers
author:
- Zhengyang Jin
- Yuhao Zhu
- T. Florian Jaeger
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- human_perception
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/cogsci25.pdf
journ: CogSci
year: 2025
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 98
---
